name: Comment Thread
description: An accessible nested discussion thread or comments feed, utilizing semantic article layout, collapsing/expanding sub-threads, and full keyboard accessibility.

keyboardNavigation.description: Moves focus between comments, replies, voting controls, and text input areas.
Triggers comment collapse, vote actions, and form submissions.

ariaAttributes.description: Identifies the scrollable container of discussion items.
Indicates whether replies to a comment are visible or collapsed.
Groups the nested reply comments under their parent comment.
